stages.question: Which poster would best encourage kids to be honest with money?

choices.text: Always tell the truth about money! 💰

stages.question: What poster would best show the importance of honesty with money?
Which poster teaches the best honesty habit with money?

choices.text: Lie about how much money you have! 🤥
Always share the truth about money! 🤝

stages.question: What poster would best show how money and honesty connect?

choices.text: Honest money choices build good character! 🌟
It's OK to lie about money! 🙊

stages.question: Which poster best explains the result of honest money choices?

choices.text: Honest money choices make me trustworthy! 🌟
